    "R1.6": "The most natural interpretation of 'take a look' defaults to writing-level feedback; the artifact contains identifiable prose defects (comma-splice run-ons in paragraphs 2 and 4, strained pronoun-reference chains) that make polish the highest-probability primary ask — but this is not confirmed."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Is your primary goal feedback on writing quality and prose polish (sentence clarity, grammar, flow) rather than on the scientific or structural soundness of the content (claim validity, evidence alignment, novelty, paragraph ordering)?"
}
